summary:
IRAQ AND MIDDLE EAST GEOPOLITICS: Brandon details a vision of a demonic principality losing its grip over Iraq, leading to the rise of a new Kurdish businessman politician and economic growth comparable to Saudi Arabia based on oil. Brandon connects this to current events such as the United Arab Emirates leaving OPEC and geopolitical shifts involving Russia and Iran. Brandon states that a peace agreement is forming in the Middle East involving figures like Jared Kushner and MBS, alongside discussions of the third temple and a coming war aligned with Ezekiel.

GLOBAL EVENTS AND ASTROLOGICAL SIGNS: Brandon recounts prophecies regarding targeted domestic infrastructure, specifically mentioning oil facilities in Russia, as well as locations like Tulsa, Louisiana, and Houston. Brandon highlights celestial signs, noting a recent fireball meteor with a sonic boom in Argentina and an asteroid passing close to Earth. Brandon explicitly states that weather is being weaponized using technologies like HAARP, pointing to record-breaking rainfall and flooding in southern China as evidence of these orchestrated environmental anomalies.

UNITED STATES POLITICS AND CORRUPTION: Brandon discusses systemic fraud and political shifts in the United States, specifically focusing on FBI raids on child care facilities in Minnesota connected to the Walz administration and highlighting political figures like Ilhan Omar and Mike Lindell. Brandon mentions a vision of a red wave and bees swarming corrupt politicians. Brandon additionally references a budget crisis in New York City while explicitly stating he observed a demonic entity in the eye of a local politician during a broadcast. Brandon also describes an Antichrist anointing and darkness attempting to influence the mind of Donald Trump in the Oval Office regarding Agenda 2030, digital currency, and constitutional amendments.

FAITH TEACHINGS AND YOUTH REVIVAL: Brandon emphasizes the necessity of strict adherence to faith, referencing the wealth transfer mentioned in Deuteronomy and the ministries of John Kilpatrick and George Mueller. Brandon claims to have seen Jesus multiple times and explains the operational differences between angels, who constantly look to the Father, and demons, who seek attention and operate through familiar spirits. Brandon concludes by detailing a vision of a massive impending youth revival spreading globally across regions such as Cuba, Asia, Australia, Canada, and Minnesota, accompanied by healing declarations for conditions like Lyme disease.
rawData: [April 29, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/QLk3uWjK0jU]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We're going to go over some of the things the Lord showed us in prayer, but I won't touch a lot of it. I'm going to talk to you about the articles and some of the things that happened in the news today. And what we have seen, and then we're just going to pray. I won't keep you for a long time. I'm trying to tonight, at least, keep it underneath an hour and a half, two hours, two and a half hours. It's a long time for some of you. It's wearing some of you weary. That is a good word to say. Some of you want to pray for hours, but I want to get the most of us praying together, and it would be nice to have everybody pray together, wouldn't it, as a family? Even so, I'll try to put it more at the beginning so that people that want to pray can pray for a little bit. I want Braden to show you some of the things that he found today. We thought this was pretty interesting. Iraq, as we have been praying for Iraq. When I saw the prince of Persia, I saw that demonic spirit. It was a massive fallen angel that looked like he had his hands in Iraq and he was pulling it like he was being pulled back as President Trump was bombarding them with bombs and eliminating the Ayatollah and all that was going on. I saw that demonic spirit, his hands were slipping upon the soil. Now I know this is a metaphor; it really wasn't doing that. It is symbolic. And he was losing his grip on Iraq. And I saw him perched on that mountain with the nuclear stuff in it. That prince of Persia was standing there like an old eagle sitting on top of the mountaintop grabbing hold of it, looking out over. And I said, when I saw him lose his grip, I saw Iraq come up out of the ashes. What seemed to be great oppression over the course of what is this, 20-something years? I mean, 20, 25, 26 years. When did we invade Iraq? Bush Jr.? It's a long time ago. You don't have to look it up. I think it was 2003, right after 9/11. There has been a stronghold on Iraq since then, March 19th of 2003, so it was close. All right, so I saw that demonic principality losing a stronghold. So as we saw that, I saw buildings rising up, I saw palm trees, and I saw it becoming like Saudi Arabia, major infrastructure, all this stuff. Oil, oil, oil, as we hear Trump say, oil, oil, oil. And we have a great hand in Iraq with investments because of what we did with Saddam. And so I saw voices that were very loud were no longer here. We took them out. And those voices that had a great strong influence on Iraq's economy and such were no longer influencing it anymore because they were no longer here. They're exterminated. I saw a new leader rising up. I saw new faces. And the Lord said, "Pray for this for the bread basket of the world. You'll see this Babylon rise. Watch this. End time signs." So today, Iraq, show him. Iraq elects Kurdish politician. I don't know how to say his name. I'm not even going to try. Iran war fallout. The prince lost his grip and a new president rose up out of this. So now we see a Kurdish politician, whatever his name is, rise up. And I said, "Watch and pray over the things stuff. Watch and pray over prophecies even from other prophets that have prophesied about this." And the Lord said, "We're about to see some things happening with Iraq, pray for it." And guess what? It happened today. And what does this president specialize in? He's a banker, businessman. Who is this guy? The businessman named as Iraq's PM designated politician outsider is tapped as Iraq's new leader to break a month-long political deadlock. It's a deadlock. Okay, it was a deadlock and all this was going on. Sorry, the political deadlock that was going on with Iraq is now over today. This guy specializes in banking and finances. He's a businessman similar to Trump. We see Nouri al-Maliki is done. And I say he was bad. We didn't want Nouri al-Maliki. He was a bad man. He was in with Iran. But I don't know about this new guy. But the Lord warned us to pray for Iraq as we would see Iraq because of this prince of Persia losing his grip on it. And so now we see fruit of that. Today I believe something is a change now. Is he evil? I don't know. We will find out. I don't know nothing about this man. I just thought it was interesting that this is what we were seeing about it. And the Lord said they will be like Saudi Arabia in the days ahead financially with oil and all this. They will come up out of seemingly nowhere. You'll see them become the Islamic Brotherhood and all the Islamic whatever will all become friends. I don't mean to be offensive. Brandon has to work on tech. The Holy Spirit corrected me immediately. I apologize. I just got in trouble from the Holy Spirit. So, the devil that's not wanted. That's better. Okay, we'll say it's the unwanted devil in the house. We got rid of it. Iran was the unwanted devil. Nobody wanted Iran there. That's good. I get flustered when I get corrected like that live. I go, "Oh, sorry, sorry." I walk a thin line, y'all. I walk a very thin line and I follow him because I have to have him. I have to have the Holy Spirit. And when you grieve him and you grieve things when I say things, I feel him withdraw. It's like I go, "Oh, okay. Sorry. We got to fix it because we need him more than we need us. You don't want Brandon. I can't do this without him. I am nothing. And I depend so much on him on everything I do on this. So, we see what this is happening and it's what the Lord warned us. So, praise the Lord. Next, the United Arab Emirates will leave OPEC in a blow to the oil cartel. I said, look, look at all this happening today, huh? What's going on? Iraq has a new president. United Arab Emirates will leave OPEC. All this stuff happening and oil, oil, oil. What is going on around here? It's like my friend Billy Buerberg said, "What's going on around here?" Ready? Okay. And then we have the old. Yep. Keep going. So, we have another oil refinery in Russia today. I wonder what caused it to do that. Mysterious. Oil refinery. Just coincidence, huh? Is it burnt to the ground? Burnt to the ground, whatever's left of Russia's oil facility. It looks charcoal. It looked like you could have a weenie roast, a weenie roast with toxic fumes. But yeah, another one. Is that coincidence? I think not. Y'all need to know. That's why the Lord said, "Pray over Tulsa. Pray over Louisiana. Pray over Houston. For they are targets in the days ahead. Pray over these facilities and for train tracks, for pipelines." And what did the Lord say? As of April 1st, the Lord said, "Signs in the heavens. You will start to see major meteors come into the atmosphere and it will bring sonic booms that will break out the glass over your home and businesses." They will be so loud. It will be like a train. It sounds like a freight train. What happened today, April the 27th? We have one in Argentina. Just happened again. Another major meteor entered the atmosphere. Do you see it? Yep. Do they see it? Everybody's freaking out because this one left a sonic boom. They said it was really loud, from what I understand. It was a fireball, and everybody could see it for a long ways away. Some people say it was a sonic boom, from what I understand. Is that correct? Yeah, it was loud. So it fulfilled some of the word that the Lord gave us concerning major signs in the heavens. We're seeing them. Wait until the big one comes. I've seen one that is massive that's coming. When does it become not a meteor and it's an asteroid? How big does it have to be to break the meteor category? I don't know. A newly discovered asteroid approached Earth closer than our geostationary orbit. Look at that. Do you remember I told you I saw a rock headed? I didn't know this, Braden. That's amazing. Newly discovered asteroid 2026 HZ4 approached closer than our satellites two days ago. It is two to seven meters wide. That's not the one I saw. I see one that's massive. It's the size of a massive house, and it's massive. So we see signs in the heavens. They're happening. Ready? Next. Okay, and then there's this record. We have record rainfall in one hour. This is weaponizing weather. I told you they will weaponize weather in the days ahead. This is not normal. A city in southern China got over 160 mm of rain in one hour yesterday, shattering local April records. Cars are submerged and rescue boats are navigating through the streets. Look at all that rain in one hour. They're weaponizing the weather. Look at that. They're just stranded. They're just there. Got to get a lifeboat. That's not normal. I said they're going to use weather as a weapon with some kind of HAARP. We've talked about this over and over again. There will be great droughts in some places and it will be so dry that it will crack the riverbeds and the lakes and there will be nothing left. Then there'll be so much weather in some places. This is what I heard and this is what I saw, and we're seeing it on the news. We've seen a lot of fireballs and Braden has this report, but I'm not smart enough to tell you what that is. What is that? They're saying it was in 20 states. Yeah, in Germany. So it goes over each one of the fireballs that have entered into the Earth's atmosphere since the beginning of this year. Correct. Look at all of them. Do you see all that? That's an acceleration. There's a lot over America. I didn't realize there were that many. This says 2026. So it must be the same one. I wonder if that's the same one, right? Yeah, it probably is. These are just people that are telling about it. That's pretty neat. Your little chart. Cool. And then whatever you had, let's listen to him. What's the Batman? Professor X or whatever? One of those guys. The villain on the Batman. He's coming to Gotham and he's telling everybody what he's saying. My fellow citizens of Gotham, what is he saying? Where's Batman at? He's not around. Go ahead and play him. Let's listen to this guy. He's an idiot. New York City faces a budget crisis of a historic magnitude. We inherited a deficit larger than any since the Great Recession. Years of mismanagement and chronic underbudgeting alongside a structural imbalance between what New York City sends to the state and what we receive in return have taken a toll. We cannot close this deficit with savings alone. We need new revenue and we need a structural reset in our relationship with the state. That is the only way to meet our legal obligation to pass a balanced budget and to do so without imposing a financial burden onto the backs of working people. I'm glad to partner with Speaker Menon as we call upon Albany and deliver a balanced budget. Together, we are extending the executive budget deadline from this coming Friday until May 12th because a crisis of this scale cannot be solved without state action. I want to be clear, we are not simply asking others to act. New York City is doing our part. We are committed to governing with the fiscal responsibility this moment demands. Speaker Menon and I have already identified meaningful savings and we will continue that work carefully, deliberately, and without cutting the services that New Yorkers rely on, but we cannot do it... especially in the right eye. You see that? That is why we are standing together this morning to underscore what is at stake and to call on Albany to deliver additional revenue. She knew what I'm talking about here. She did it immediately. She's like, 'Don't look at that eye.' She's talking about that devil in her eye. She's noticing on there. And she's going like this immediately. Don't talk about that devil. She knew about it. Look at that. There it is. It's in that eye. I saw it. What's it doing in there? How did she let it in? All right, let's go next. They're talking about Minnesota. FBI raids Minneapolis child care facility part of sweeping fraud investigations. It's coming. The Red Wave. I'm telling you, I believe with all my heart that Minneapolis, Minnesota, all this area is going to have a major Red Wave. I'm praying for Mike Lindell to take this and to win it with a landslide victory in the name of Jesus. And it's time for Ilhan Omar. The bees. They were coming up out of the ground before any of this started to take place. The Lord showed us bees coming up out of the ground and swarming her head. I didn't know what I was seeing, but I said they weren't just normal bees. These were queen bees. They came up out of the ground and they started swarming her, and I saw them starting to sting her, and I said, 'Her days are almost done.' And the Lord said, 'Fraud.' He brought it all up. Remember, we even have that. Yes, but it doesn't matter. We don't have time. So we see fraud investigation. FBI is helping out. Thank God for the FBI. Next. I don't have anything else. Well, that's good. We got it. Well, you did good. Thank you, Braden, for all your hard work. This one, I need to put my plate. That was November the 26th. The Lord gave this word. December 11th. Yeah, but that's not when we gave it. That's whenever you made the short. Oh, because that was when it was already showing up in the news, right? And you were just confirming we prophesied it way before... the Lord gave it to us way before that. So did we get the word on December 11th? I think so. Play it. Minnesota to flip red for there's major victory. The people are tired of the corruption. There's great corruption in Minnesota. And I see the girl, the African-American woman, she's with that thing on her head. The Squad. I'm seeing the Squad. That girl from the Squad. And I see her face before me. It's concerning corruption. And I see people are fed up with this and want to replace her. It's time for her to go. I see corruption, but out of the corruption, there springs forth a hive of bumblebees. Out of the corruption, big black and yellow bumblebees are coming up around her concerning Minnesota. Is she even in Minnesota, son? I don't know why I'm seeing this. And she may not even be in Minnesota, but we say, 'Brandon, you're missing that big.' I'm telling you, I'm seeing—you know how when you start a hive and the bees start circling you, trying to sting you, and you start running—these bees are coming up out of the land there. Beautiful flowers and there's green, and the bees are coming up out of the land and they're circling this woman's head. The Walz administration responding today to speculation from federal authorities that fraud in Minnesota could total $9 billion or more. I see a great breakthrough concerning the removal. We need to stand on this concerning the politics in Minnesota, and I stand with Living Word. We stand with the church of Living Word and we will continue to pray over this. This is a major crack in the foundation, and this is because of much prayer from Minnesota. There's much prayer concerning this. I'm hearing it and I'm telling you it's all right. You're not playing anymore. It's kind of boring, but praise the Lord. We keep rolling. We keep going. You know, I could go over some of the things the Lord showed me last night. I was very bothered by some of it. Whenever you get into that river of prayer and it's pulling you and you're praying for the nation, you're praying for the end times like we were last night—and if you were a part of that prayer group, thank you for being here—I truly am so appreciative. When the Lord asked, 'Can you give me 30 more minutes?' there were so many of you that stayed and we prayed another 30 minutes. And when the Lord was showing me the third temple, the new temple, and the two-state solution with Jared, and I saw MBS, I saw leaders in the Middle East rising up and I saw a peace agreement coming. I saw Ezekiel 38 and 39. I saw the hook in the jaw. Do you see right now Russia talking to Iran? The hook in the jaw. There are things that are taking place and we are on a rice-paper-thin timeline of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. It's rice-paper-thin. Iran is having meetings right now with Putin. And I thought this was just interesting that there was somebody that pointed out that there are not black diamonds the way that I saw with Putin's hand, that it's not in the card deck, that it would be him cheating. And I think it's interesting because the things that I see, like I said, I don't play cards. I don't know anything about poker or what's a good hand and what's not a good hand, you know? I just think an Ace or whatever is probably good. I don't know. So when I see those things and I see him with the diamonds in his hands and people point out the played cards, I don't know. And I thought, 'Wow.' So he's cheating. He's holding his cards. But Trump had all the hearts. He had a flush. After I told Braden we were studying it as a flush, and he was in that raft. But the Lord shows me as I was praying how close we truly are to the coming of the Lord and where we are going into Rosh Hashanah 9/11. It starts at sundown of 9/11 going into the 13th, which would be I believe Sunday or whatever, of September. So the Lord was showing me an acceleration of things. But as I was looking into this acceleration, I saw a lot of storm. I saw a lot of darkness. And I don't like talking about some of this stuff. It was very heavy. When I got done, I didn't want to talk about it at all. I could see the next president. I could see a new leader coming. I'll call him the lizard. I'll call him a chameleon. All I want to tell you is the church needs to rise up with a backbone like a crowbar. You know, we're running out of time. Regardless if you want to believe it or not, there's some people that say we have all these years left. I'm not going to ever tell you that. I believe with all my heart that Jesus is coming sooner than later. He's coming. And I have an urgency in my heart every time I do these broadcasts to tell you, you must get your heart right before him. It's time to seek him like you have never been seeking him before. Fall on your face before a holy God. And like some people say, 'suck carpet, eat carpet', I don't know, whatever. Be on your face praying at the altar, whatever it takes. Get yourself right. It's not time to play church anymore. It's not time to be that lukewarm body anymore. It's not church as usual. It's church unusual. We're going to see things we've never seen before. As we're seeing the birthing pains rise all around, it's increasing all around us in every single nation as you look at this. So as I was looking into—I was trying, like I said, I am not a theology major when it comes to the book of Revelation and teaching things like Perry Stone or Rick Renner or any of these other people that know the book of Revelation like they could quote it backwards, frontwards, and all sides. They know where everything's at and they study it and have hours and hours and hours of teaching. It's very confusing to me. So when I'm seeing something and I'm looking into it, I'm looking at it going, 'Ezekiel 38 and 39 is the cause for what I could see.' And don't, if I'm wrong, do not throw rocks at me. What I was perceiving by my interpretation was that this is what brings forth the peace agreement. I could see a major war. I could see a major event coming. That was the biggest storm. I could see it on the East Coast. This storm was so ginormous. It was a massive storm. As this storm was trying to overshadow our president, I saw a darkness trying to come upon him. That was an Antichrist anointing, trying to influence his mind, trying to influence him with great pressure. He was resisting, but it was the pressure of the end times. It was the pressure of where we are. There is such a pull for the end of the end, for this dispensation of grace is coming to an end. Tribulation is about to begin. And the birthing pains are all around us. We've talked about that. But the pressure of where we are is felt on even the greatest leader, the leader of the free world. And I saw a darkness that looked like a cloak that was in the background trying to influence him. And the Lord said, 'Do you see the reason why I'm calling everyone to pray? To intercede for his mind? To intercede for him all the time so that he does not get—' If it was anybody else like an Obama or anybody, it tries to engulf you, but you have to submit yourself therefore unto God, resist the devil and he will flee. Regardless of temptation or whatever, all of us have to do it. That's what the Bible commissioned and told us to do. But even him with the greatest position, the leading of all this, this pressure of the end times... it was pressure. It looked like someone had put on this black whatever this was, it looked like something that would weigh thousands of pounds on top of his shoulders. And I was looking at it and he was in the Oval Office and it was trying to change his countenance. It was trying to change his thinking because it is a spirit. It's the same kind of demonic spirit that tried to mess with Hitler, but Hitler yielded to it. It's the difference between somebody saying, 'I'm tempted to do whatever.' You can either resist it, or you can succumb to the temptation. Everyone's human. Do you understand? And nobody knows the pressure of leading the United States of America. Nobody does it unless you're a president. And I saw the pressure of the position, but it wasn't just about leading the Western world or America. It was about what was influencing the end-time events concerning digital currency, the First Amendment, the Second Amendment, our Bill of Rights, and everything. It was pressure because it's Agenda 2030. It's concerning taking away freedoms from people. Do you understand? As I was seeing that Illuminati wall with the mask and the demonic cow that was demanding blood sacrifice of children, we see the pressure of everything. When I was looking at it, I could see the end times. But then I saw one behind him and I could see dates and I could see somebody that is a chameleon. As I was looking into this, it kind of freaked me out, and that's why I never use some of these names that I see. But I saw—I won't call it a betrayal; I'll call it a yielding to it. Some people have character and some people don't. Whenever you're thrust into great responsibility when you have not been on the potter's wheel of refining, your character can't handle something that is put on you so quickly. That's like if you gave someone who is 19 years old a billion dollars and they were never raised with money. If they were never raised in a household that had money like that and you gave a 19-year-old that kind of money, what would it do to them? It would destroy them because they don't have the character to handle it. So, I saw great responsibility come upon people that weren't ready for it. And as the pressure of something so big—and it wasn't just about America, it was about the end times—President Trump is almost 80; his birthday is coming in May, so he's seasoned. And he's even struggling. You can tell with all this pressure, it's something that most of us could never even hold. That's why I'm trying to tell you all what I saw. I saw Europe. I saw certain leaders and I saw great war and the plague. I could see another plague; I could see a major shaking of the plague. But at the same time, I could see the church and I could see people running to church. And the glory was there. The glorious church was rising and it was something to be seen. I try to focus more on the glorious side. Like I said, it's that thin of a line. It's rice-paper thin. It's even thinner than that, of how close the glory will be and the darkness. It's like a quarter. And there's so many people that don't realize how hard of times there will be for some people. He said, 'I've warned and I've warned. I've yelled and I've yelled to warn the people of that which is to come, and they haven't had ears to hear. They haven't prepared. Many of you will be caught off guard. Many of you will make it. I saw that a lot of you would make it. But it's the difference between making it and being in abundance, and making it and being in survival mode. Both make it; one's just more comfortable than the other. God will always take care of His kids; God will always provide for His kids. But there's a difference between just eating and having the good of the land. Does that make sense? Just because you listen to Him. Joseph had plenty, but his brothers were lacking and they had to ask him for help. Joseph's like, 'Well, if you would have been with me, I would have told you how to get everything ready for the last seven years, and you weren't ready, but great famine's coming.' Joseph knew and he was ready, but his brothers were still taken care of. They still got everything, but they had to come to themselves in that hard time. They went to him to ask for help in the drought and the famine. Maybe that's not a good illustration for what I've seen, but it's something that the people need to understand. We've never experienced what we're about to experience, especially in this generation. There's many of you that are so used to going through McDonald's and having it your way that you've never seen some of the things that I have seen in the spirit. I've never experienced it, but what I see is not really pleasant to my flesh. I always go, 'Tell me the rapture of the church happens before some of this.' That's why I get quiet. Are we really here for that? The church was here. I could see it. It didn't look that great to me. The church was walking in glory and we were laying hands on people and there was blessing on the people. Do you remember whenever I said Deuteronomy 6:11? Yeah, there will be vineyards you do not plant. Houses filled with all kinds of good things you did not provide. Wells you did not dig and vineyards and olive groves you did not plant. Then when you eat and are satisfied, he said there'll be a remnant of you, a one percent, that this wealth transfer is going to be such a blessing that you're going to be able to help the other people out because you listened and obeyed. And there will be a wealth transfer for houses filled with all kinds of good things you did not provide. That means you didn't have to work for it. It's just there. God did it. Wells you did not dig. It took a long time to dig a well back then and get a good one. Vineyards—a lot of work. And olive groves you did not plant. You just got it because the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous. That's what He was showing me last night. And that was concerning certain ministers. I even brought up John Kilpatrick. I saw great blessing coming on this man and his church. I saw certain key members in his church last night that had invested and they're about to come into a lot of money. When I was in the spirit, I could see this man's church. I am not affiliated with him at all. I don't know him. I don't even watch them. I've watched a couple of his sermons, but the Lord brings it up to me. I see his face, but there's something about him that the Lord tells me, 'Pray for this man, for his health, specifically for him to be strong, because God has a plan for his life.' But He said this to me about this man. He gave me Deuteronomy for him. And that was concerning his church. And the Lord said, 'Lay hold to it.' He said, 'There's many of you that have not been obedient to doing what He's asking you to do. You've pushed it away. You have a call on your life and you've not yielded to it. You've not been obedient to what God's called you to do. It's all hands on deck right now. For the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. Will you obey what God has called you to do in these last days and stop running from Him? He's going to bypass you and go to the next person if you keep putting up your hands and say He's out of time. He's not begging you. 'You? You're only 15. I don't care. Come on. How old are you? You're 12. Let's do it.' Nothing's going to disqualify you. Keep underneath the mighty hand of the Lord and humble yourself. Keep out of sin. Keep yourself right before Him by prayer and fasting, seeking Him daily. Now, if you fall down in sin, you run to God when you sin; you don't run away from Him. I'm not saying that any of us are perfect. But I'm not saying you deliberately practice and do things that you know you shouldn't be doing. Now, if you mess up in life and you drop a bad word or something, people mess up. I'm talking about people who are deliberately... you know what, bud? Let's go to the strip club this weekend and we'll repent on Sunday. Let's go out and get drunk tonight. Let's go get wasted. You know that's wrong, but you do it because, you know what? It's okay; God knows it's under grace. You know, it's okay to cheat on your wife or husband or whatever; I'll repent about it. She's not fulfilling my needs. He's not fulfilling my needs. So, I'm just going to go out and, you know, we have an open marriage; it's cool. It's wrong, and you know it's wrong, but yet you keep dipping in. The wages of sin is death, and that's what I'm talking about. You know it's wrong, and you keep trying. You keep doing the same thing over. You don't run to God; you run to the devil and his crowd and think, 'Well, I'm saved by grace. I can live both sides. One foot is over here and I have one foot over there, and we're okay.' And those are the ones I'm talking about right now. It's time to be all in. It's time to sell out for Jesus, to look at Him as a holy God, and we are made in His image and we need to be holy as He is holy. I'm going to do everything I can to be as far away from the world and what they want and what they think is cool. I want to be as close as I can to Him, sitting in His lap, listening to His breath. What can I do to be closer to Him? I'm not just right on the edge of living in the world and barely in the church; I want to be all in. I want to know what His breath smells like if He has breath. If He has bad breath that day, which I'm sure He doesn't, but if He did, I want to know that He did, or what kind of fragrance He had. 'Did you spray some cologne on, Lord? I want to know what You have on today. What is it? Is it frankincense today?' I want that because I'm that close. I just want to know Him. And I know that when you seek Him, you will find Him because I have those moments like I had last night. And I could see all that was coming. And after it was over, the presence filled me. And He says, 'Think on these things: whatsoever things are lovely, whatsoever things are pure, whatsoever things are of good report.' I could go on and on. How did he treat his fellow brethren? How did he walk in love? How did you treat people when you think you're better than them? Do you bless them?
